reviews.review_msg: This professor is genuinely awful. His lectures are not helpful, he does not teach what is on the exam, and when asking questions about the content, much of the time he either cannot answer them correctly or his explanation doesn't make sense. DO NOT TAKE THIS PROFESSOR!!
i am under the water, help me

Pulindu is a terrible prof. His slides contain numerous spelling mistakes and errors, leading to them making very little sense. His final exam contained many mistakes, to the point that he stopped us 2 hours in and had to clarify. He makes very little sense when explaining content and just reads the slides to you.
I believe they needed someone to teach the course and chose him at random. The number of typos in each class, and even two hours into the final?! Prepare to study by yourself. EXTREMELY HORRIBLE.
Avoid. At. Any. Cost. Worst prof, was a mistake to not drop the course after the first week.

Pulindu is not very talented in explaining materials. However, I do believe he is passionate about the math. The main issue is that the course is difficult, and giving lectures is hard. He is also a very new instructor. Still, the course itself is very difficult, so I don't blame him too much for not being able to teach it easily.

Extremely unprofessional, the quality of the lectures is not the university level whatsoever. Lecture slides, assignments, and even the final exam had typos he had to make an announcement. He is not good at explaining or answering questions at all. Exam questions were so random he probably just copied and pasted from random external sources.

In many assignments and lectures, he had many errors needing clarification via announcements or assignment resubmissions. One of which was him not copy pasting a question from the textbook properly. In the final, he made a significant mistake which was clarified 2hr in, after many had left. He is not at the level of a university professor.

The worst prof ever to join SFU. Avoid at all costs. His final was tough af All of his questions made no sense and  exam literally had nothing related to what he taught in class, he expected the students to do everything. He skipped classes and did not take the seriously.

Pulindu spends most of the time in class reading off the slides. His accent makes the class really unengaging and boring. He doesn't assign any homework questions after lectures making it hard to understand concepts. It would be better if you just read the textbook instead.

Lecture was held in SFU's largest lecture room, but only a few students showed up. He missed many lectures, requiring other professor to step in and teach. He just reads PDF files (contains errors), and the exams randomly sourced from websites on Google. He is cared strike, he really doesn't care about the students and how his actions impact them.
Not the best. He isn't audible during the lectures. If you could study the material on your own, then go for it.

based on reviews i thought he be horrible but he isn't. his slides are better version of the textbook even tho there are typos. He is helpful out of class and always takes time after class to help. He also gives a lot of opportuntiy to ask questions during class. the problem is he is not an engaging lecturer. tests are fair and are the same to hw.

I genuinely don't think he is qualified to teach. Lecture slides have countless typos/mistakes, which is extremely distracting. Even after he uploads a new slide (which he does not tell students, so we don't know which slides are the latest), it still has some typos/mistakes. His excuses are always "Because I just copy-paste from the textbook".
Useless Prof. I got an A. The course was easy but he shouldn't teach

Im a good very good math student and this guy is terrible. He is barely audible during lectures. He doesn't prepare you for anything. But his test are difficult not because the subject is difficult, but because they are so poorly written and throws misdirectors in the tests like misnaming variables to throw you off. Avoid at all costs.
No teaching at all and hard exams. I would not call him an instructor, he is rather someone random who happens to be offering a course.

Terrible prof. If you want to read 600 pages and teach yourself everything, this course is perfect for you. But if you like learning from a professor (because that's why you pay for courses at a university), avoid Pulindu at all costs.

Pulindu was not that useful, the course outline provided was not the best way to go for an online course. Walked into a 40% midterm with little information and didn't know what to expect. There was a heavy lack of resources and the ones given were quite useless (lectures were a video of another prof reading the textbook). Did less than bare minimum

Do not take a class with this prof. I am not great at math to begin with but man was this class bad. Very not helpful, took over a week to answer a quick email. Exams were filled with spelling mistakes and typos (obviously not proofread prior to the exams) . Content was unclear and all over the place. be warned lol

all im going to say is if you plan on taking a class with Pulindu get ready to teach yourself everything. this class was living hell. Exams were not fair and there were often marking mistakes. If you are taking a class with him i pray for your well being because you will be mentally destroyed after his exams

this guy didn't teach anything you are basically expected to read the textbook and learn the content all on your own with no help from him. he gives no guidelines from what to expect for exams even though exams make up 80% of your mark. it takes him months to mark assignments and clearly does not care at all about his students

If you care at all about your mental health do not take this class with Pulindu. He didn't teach at all and the "lectures" are short 5 min videos from the author of the textbook not him he doesn't let you use a formula sheet for the final and exams make up 80% of your grade easily the worst prof i have ever had
IGNORE THESE 5/5 REVIEWS PLEASE. Pulindu is not amazing. His midterm was extremely hard even if you practiced and did the textbook questions. HE DOES NOT reply to emails
Pulindus assignments were straight from the textbook and very easy to get 100%s on. The midterm was a bit tricky but I can see why it was fair. I personally would take him again
He is so bad I rather kill myself

To put into perspective how terribly formatted this class is, the midterm covered 1/3 of the material, and the final will cover over 2/3 of the course material + pre-midterm stuff. We get to bring one cheat sheet for the final, but the prof limits that to one page, double sided. It's impossible to fit 600 pages of material on just one page, 2-sided

Pulindu is the worst professor I have ever encountered. I don't even know if I can call him a professor. He doesn't teach, doesn't respond to students, he doesn't even do any of the grading. 80% of the course grade comes from exams, and he doesn't even give us a formula sheet for the final. How do you expect us to memorize 600 pages of information?

I was expecting decent support since this is an online class. However, weeks go by and the only material you get aside from the textbook is 1 to 3 Tim Swartz's short example videos. Sometimes we get poorly made slides that are worse than the textbook + "lecture video" that reads whatever is on the slides for 1 hour. These don't help with anything!

Pulindu shows no compassion for his students, with zero intent to interact with us. He does not respond to emails or messages on Canvas. We are marked almost entirely off one midterm and the final (40% each), so if you do poorly on one, you will get a bad grade. His lectures have an absurd amount of content that is not practical to learn.

Absolutely awful, there are no guidelines for what we should know. Corrections do not point out what's wrong with the answers given. There's little to no instruction on what we should look out for on the exams or what we should be studying in the lectures as he uses a different professor's videos. Wasted a semester taking this class. DO NOT TAKE.
The exam is in a few days and I don't even think I learned anything. I am so confused and I have no idea what the midterm is on.

He is the professor for the class, but he's not even the one teaching the lecture videos!!! There's structure to the course, but when it comes time for the exam, there are very few instructions on how to prepare for it.
I'll just put it simply. I dropped from a 3.8 GPA to a 3.1 after this class.
For the love of god and your mental health do not take this course.

Never encountered such a useless professor. He doesn't teach, doesn't mark on time, doesn't help when you ask questions. He doesn't explain what he expects of you for the exams, and the exams are tough af. Don't take a class with this guy.
Impossible to reach, and course materials are painful with basically no lectures to help assist in the learning.

I can't fit everything in here, but this prof is awful. Bad with technology, can't reach him on Canvas. Doesn't grade stuff in a time manner (like months), makes you learn material you don't need to know for life or for the tests. HW is supposed to prepare me for class and tests so why is is different material? 0/10
